record.field: Risk Analysis For USSD Delivery Channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'ussd';
Analysis for customers using ussd channel
Risk Analysis For Alt Bank Channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'alt_bank';
Analysis for customers using alt bank channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'banca';
Analysis for customers using banca channel
Risk Analysis For Carded Customer Channel

SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'carded_customer';
Analysis for customers using carded customer channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'doubble';
Analysis for customers using doubble channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'onebank';
Analysis for customers using onebank channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'specta';
Analysis for customers using specta channel
Risk Analysis For Sterling Pro Channel

SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'sterling_pro';
Analysis for customers using sterling pro channel
SELECT 1 FROM customer_channel_subscription ccs JOIN digital_delivery_channel ddc ON ccs.channel_id = ddc.id WHERE ccs.partner_id::integer = %s AND ccs.value::bool = true and ddc.code = 'switch';
Analysis for customers using switch channel
Risk Analysis For Master Card Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'master_card_001'
Analysis for customers using master card product
Risk Analysis For TT C Card Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'tt_c_card_test'
Analysis for customers using master tt c card product
Risk Analysis For TA Current Individual Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'ta_current_individual'
Analysis for customers using master ta current individual product
Risk Analysis For TA Current Corporate Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'ta_current_corporate'
Analysis for customers using ta current corporate product
Risk Analysis For Saving Tier 3 NGN Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'switch_savings_tier3_ngn'
Analysis for customers using switch savings tier3 ngn product
Risk Analysis For Individual PB Overdraft NGN Product
SELECT 1 FROM res_partner_account a INNER JOIN res_partner r ON r.id = a.customer_id WHERE r.id = %s and a.category = 'individual_pb_overdraft'
